description: Source of truth for calculator categories. Each category has a slug (URL segment), name (display), tagline (1-line intro), and tools array. The primary nav and /calculators/ hub render from this. Only categories with at least one tool should appear in the nav.

categories.name: Broadband
categories.tagline: Work out the speed, bandwidth, and plan that actually fits your household or office.

tools.name: Broadband Bandwidth Calculator
tools.summary: Estimate the download and upload speeds your household needs based on streaming, video calls, gaming, smart devices, and remote work.

tools.name: Web Hosting Storage & Bandwidth Estimator
tools.summary: Work out how much storage and monthly bandwidth your website needs based on your traffic, page weight, media files, and downloadable content. See which hosting tier fits.

categories.name: Math
categories.tagline: Everyday maths tools for quick, honest answers.

tools.name: Percentage Calculator
tools.summary: Work out a percentage of a number, what percentage one number is of another, or the percentage change between two values.

categories.name: Images
categories.tagline: Resize, convert and inspect photos without uploading them anywhere.

tools.name: Photo Resizer
tools.summary: Resize and convert photos in your browser. Pick a width, a height, a format and a quality. Your image never leaves your device.

categories.name: Finance
categories.tagline: Sensible estimates for everyday money decisions.

tools.name: US Mortgage Calculator
tools.summary: Work out your monthly US mortgage payment with principal, interest, property tax, home insurance, HOA and PMI broken out separately. Total interest and total cost over the life of the loan.

tools.name: UK Mortgage Calculator
tools.summary: Work out a UK monthly mortgage payment during the fixed-rate period and after it reverts to SVR, plus stamp duty and all the cash you need on completion day.

tools.name: Loan Calculator
tools.summary: Work out the monthly payment, total interest and total cost of any fixed-rate personal, auto or student loan. See how much you save by paying extra each month. Currency is a toggle (£ / $ / €).

tools.name: Compound Interest Calculator
tools.summary: See how a starting balance and regular contributions grow with compound interest, with optional inflation adjustment and a year-by-year breakdown. Currency is a toggle.

tools.name: ROI Calculator
tools.summary: Work out the return on any investment as a percentage, net profit and annualised return (CAGR). Works for property, shares, business investments, ad spend and anything else with a cost and a return.

tools.name: SEO ROI Calculator
tools.summary: Enter your monthly SEO cost, current and projected organic traffic, and conversion data to see ROI, monthly profit, and the minimum sessions needed to break even.

tools.name: Email Marketing ROI Calculator
tools.summary: Enter your list size, send frequency, open and click rates, and conversion data to see ROI, monthly profit, cost per conversion, and the minimum list size needed to cover your costs.

categories.name: Health
categories.tagline: Quick health and fitness numbers, with the caveats made plain.

tools.name: BMI Calculator
tools.summary: Work out your body mass index in metric or imperial units, with the WHO category and an honest note on what BMI can and cannot tell you.

categories.name: Productivity
categories.tagline: Browser-based tools for everyday tasks. Nothing uploaded, nothing stored.

tools.name: iCal Event Generator
tools.summary: Create a .ics calendar file for any event. Set the date, time, timezone, location and recurrence, then download and import into Google Calendar, Apple Calendar, Outlook, or any other calendar app.

categories.name: Property
categories.tagline: Figures for buying, renting, moving, and maintaining a home.

categories.name: Wedding
categories.tagline: Planning tools for weddings. Timeline generators, date calculators, and checklists.

tools.name: Save the Date Calculator
tools.summary: Enter your wedding date to get a personalised planning timeline: when to send save-the-dates, book vendors, send formal invitations, set the RSVP deadline, and handle final preparations.

tools.name: Wedding Budget Calculator
tools.summary: Enter your total budget and guest count to get a recommended spend breakdown across venue, catering, photography, music, flowers, attire, stationery, transport, and contingency.

tools.name: Wedding Day Timeline Generator
tools.summary: Enter your ceremony time and reception end time to generate a complete wedding day schedule from bridal preparation through to carriages.

tools.name: Wedding Drinks Calculator
tools.summary: Enter your guest count and event duration to get bottle and quantity estimates for white wine, red wine, prosecco, beer, spirits, and soft drinks.

tools.name: Wedding Table Planner Calculator
tools.summary: Enter your guest count and preferred table size to find out how many tables you need, how many seats will be spare, and how alternative sizes compare.

tools.name: Wedding Catering Calculator
tools.summary: Enter your guest count, meal style, and number of courses to get portion counts and food weight estimates for every part of your wedding day.

tools.name: Wedding Anniversary Calculator
tools.summary: Enter your wedding date to find out which anniversary you are celebrating, the traditional and modern gift themes, and your upcoming milestone anniversaries.
